ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Moderator, Regular User) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the forum */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone */,
  "language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "subscription" TEXT /* User's subscription status for premium features */,
  "profile_views" INTEGER /* Number of times the user's profile has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum moderator */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the forum is locked (read-only) */,
  "last_post_date" TEXT /* Date of the last post in the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forum the thread belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the thread */,
  "thread_title" TEXT /* Title of the thread */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date of thread creation */,
  "last_reply_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reply to the thread */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies in the thread */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Indicates if the thread is stickied (always at the top) */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the thread is locked (read-only) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the thread has received */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the thread has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the thread has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thread the post belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the post has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the post has received */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is hidden (not visible to regular users) */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been edited */,
  "last_edit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last edit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tag has been used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_tags" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thread */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who associated the tag with the thread */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was associated with the thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id", "tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new reply, mentioned) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target entity (e.g., thread, post, user) related to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., delete post, ban user) */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target entity (post or user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., post, user) */,
  "is_reversed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the moderation action has been reversed */,
  "reversed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reversed the action */,
  "reversed_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was reversed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_reversed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reversed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's avatar image */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's personal or professional website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "signature" TEXT /* User's signature that appears below their posts */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* User's reputation score based on community interactions */,
  "badges" TEXT /* List of badges or achievements the user has earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "private_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each private message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the message */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "is_deleted_by_sender" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message has been deleted by the sender */,
  "is_deleted_by_receiver" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message has been deleted by the receiver */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the message was read */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message is pinned (important) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_private_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_private_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action log */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., user block, forum category creation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., user, forum, post) */,
  "is_reversed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the admin action has been reversed */,
  "reversed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who reversed the action */,
  "reversed_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was reversed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_actions_reversed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reversed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_actions_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded attachment */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., image, document) */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the attachment has been downloaded */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attachment has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the report */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target (post or thread) being reported */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., spam, abusive content) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the report */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was resolved */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution details of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
